hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'apps/'; then APP_ID=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o 'apps/[^/]*' | head -1 | cut -d/ -f2); curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/notify-change -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"appId\":\"$APP_ID\",\"file\":\"index.html\"}" 2>/dev/null; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'apps/'; then APP_ID=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o 'apps/[^/]*' | head -1 | cut -d/ -f2); curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/notify-change -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"appId\":\"$APP_ID\",\"file\":\"index.html\"}" 2>/dev/null; fi
